task_completion.description: The agent wrote the forecasting code in the specified R script file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An open text editor, IDE, or terminal showing R code saved to /home/ga/RProjects/forecast_analysis.R. The code should include library(fpp3) and references to the PBS dataset.

task_completion.description: The agent generated and saved the STL decomposition plot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named l01_decomposition.png visible in /home/ga/RProjects/output/ via a file explorer or terminal list command, or an image viewer showing a multi-panel plot (data, trend, season, remainder).

task_completion.description: The agent compared ETS and ARIMA models and saved the accuracy table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named l01_model_accuracy.csv visible in the output directory, or a terminal/editor showing its contents containing AICc values for both ETS and ARIMA models.

task_completion.description: The agent generated a 36-month forecast using the best model and saved the values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named l01_forecast_values.csv in the output directory, or its contents displayed showing 36 rows of data with columns for Month, .mean, and prediction intervals.

task_completion.description: The agent generated and saved a visualization of the history and forecast.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named l01_forecast_plot.png in the output directory, or an image viewer showing a time series plot with historical data and a 36-month forecasted line with shaded confidence intervals.

integrity.description: The agent executed the R script to generate the outputs rather than manually creating mock files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of 'Rscript forecast_analysis.R' or an R console showing the script running and successfully producing output files.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual tsibble::PBS dataset and did not hardcode the forecast values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The R script contains code loading the PBS dataset and filtering for ATC2 == 'L01'. The resulting plots and CSVs show realistic data variations, not perfectly linear or fabricated numbers.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files exactly in the requested output directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like ls /home/ga/RProjects/output/) or a file explorer confirming the 4 expected files are located exactly in /home/ga/RProjects/output/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires saving exactly 4 files to /home/ga/RProjects/output/: l01_decomposition.png, l01_model_accuracy.csv, l01_forecast_values.csv, and l01_forecast_plot.png. The forecast horizon must be exactly 36 months. CRITICAL NOTE FOR VERIFICATION: The actual historical monthly average for L01 scripts is ~23,080, with a peak of ~49,213. A correct forecast will show mean values around 48,000. Do NOT expect the forecast values to exceed 100,000; if the agent's plot or CSV shows values in the 20k-50k range, this is factually correct based on the real dataset.
